SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.vacuum

Class VacuumCollapseResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.vacuum.VacuumCollapseResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class VacuumCollapseResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a VacuumCollapseAnalyzer constant-volume cooling screening.

Summarises the minimum internal pressure reached on cooldown, the vacuum depth relative to atmospheric pressure, the margin to the vessel external-pressure (vacuum) rating, the verdict, and a screening-level make-up (pad-gas / vacuum-breaker) requirement to restore a chosen set point. The full constant-volume cooling curve is retained for plotting and traceability.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • VacuumCollapseResult

      public VacuumCollapseResult(double initialPressureBara, double initialTemperatureK, double coldEndTemperatureK, double finalPressureBara, double minimumPressureBara, double minimumPressureTemperatureK, double atmosphericPressureBara, double externalRatingBara, boolean ratingProvided, double vacuumDepthBar, double marginToRatingBar, boolean vacuumPresent, boolean withinRating, VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.VacuumVerdict verdict, double makeupSetpointBara, double makeupGasMoles, double makeupGasMassKg, double makeupGasMolarMass, List<VacuumCollapseAnalyzer.CoolingPoint> coolingCurve, List<String> warnings)
      Construct a vacuum-collapse result.
      Parameters:
      initialPressureBara - initial blocked-in pressure in bara
      initialTemperatureK - initial blocked-in temperature in K
      coldEndTemperatureK - cold-end temperature in K
      finalPressureBara - internal pressure at the cold-end temperature in bara
      minimumPressureBara - minimum internal pressure over the cooling sweep in bara
      minimumPressureTemperatureK - temperature at which the minimum pressure occurs in K
      atmosphericPressureBara - atmospheric reference pressure in bara
      externalRatingBara - vessel external-pressure (vacuum) rating in bara
      ratingProvided - true if the external-pressure rating was explicitly supplied
      vacuumDepthBar - vacuum depth below atmospheric in bar (clamped at 0)
      marginToRatingBar - minimum internal pressure minus the external rating in bar
      vacuumPresent - true if a vacuum develops
      withinRating - true if the minimum pressure stays at or above the external rating
      verdict - the screening verdict
      makeupSetpointBara - make-up / pad-gas set point in bara
      makeupGasMoles - screening make-up gas requirement in mol
      makeupGasMassKg - screening make-up gas requirement in kg
      makeupGasMolarMass - make-up gas molar mass used in kg/mol
      coolingCurve - constant-volume cooling curve points
      warnings - list of warnings; never null

    • getInitialPressureBara

      public double getInitialPressureBara()
      Gets the initial blocked-in pressure.

      external-pressure rating in bara

      public boolean isRatingProvided()
      Indicates whether an external-pressure rating was explicitly supplied.
      Returns:
      true if a rating was supplied

    • getVacuumDepthBar

      public double getVacuumDepthBar()
      Gets the vacuum depth below atmospheric pressure.
      Returns:
      vacuum depth in bar (clamped at 0)

    • getMarginToRatingBar

      public double getMarginToRatingBar()
      Gets the margin between the minimum internal pressure and the external rating.
      Returns:
      margin in bar; negative when the rating is exceeded

    • isVacuumPresent

      public boolean isVacuumPresent()
      Indicates whether a vacuum develops.
      Returns:
      true if the minimum pressure is below atmospheric

    • isWithinRating

      public boolean isWithinRating()
      Indicates whether the minimum pressure stays within the external rating.
      Returns:
      true if the minimum pressure is at or above the external rating

    • getVerdict

      the vacuum verdict
